description: Product Description Infant Shoes Material Canvas, soft and comfortable, lightweight and anti-slip sole is well-crafted to make walking feel natural. Easy on and Off Unique Lace-up Design make our baby slippers easy to put on and off which ensure the walking shoes stay on baby’s little feet perfectly. Perfect For Any Occasions The toddler shoes flats also can be used for christening baptisms, weddings, holiday photos, Party, Wedding, Photography, Family Gatherings or and even daily life.
